rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 4/10 and reach the same conclusion through the same reasoning: the candidate lacks SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator, and deep-learning workload experience for the Principal Performance Architect role. The differences are reworded justifications and reordered strengths/concerns that fall within ordinary run-to-run variation. Neither evaluation references the career-gap dates, caregiving, or any demographic signal, and the score did not move.
